# Spec — <feature name>

> Copy to `docs/specs/<feature>.md`. Keep it short. Spec before build (`workflows/01-spec-and-plan.md`).

**Status:** draft | approved | shipped
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Owner:** <you>

## Goal
What does this enable, and for whom? One or two sentences.

## Acceptance criteria
Testable statements that mean "done":
- [ ] …
- [ ] …
- [ ] …

## Approach (plan)
How you'll build it — the files/areas touched, the shape of the change.

## Risks & rollback
- What could break:
- How to undo:
- Scoped Approval tier (docs / app-code / schema-auth-billing):

## Out of scope
What this explicitly will NOT do (prevents scope creep).

## Open questions
Anything ambiguous — resolve before building (the Not-Psychic Rule).

## Decisions
Link any ADRs this spec produces (`docs/adr/NNNN-*.md`).
